**6. **Vrijen to share AI/LLM learning resources** - Elaine expressed strong interest in learning more about design patterns and LLM development. Vrijen committed to sending YouTube recommendations (Nate B. Jones, Three Blue One Brown) plus other intermediate-to-advanced resources. **Why it matters**: Elaine is actively leveling up her technical skills and specifically asked how to learn design patterns—addressing this builds relationship and positions Vrijen as helpful expert.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal

   📝 From meeting recap...

**7. **Elaine to try Zo platform with promo code** - Vrijen demonstrated his N5 personal operating system built in Zo, showcased automated meeting processing, and offered 50% discount via promo code VA-T5. Elaine showed genuine interest ("I'll definitely check it out"). **Why it matters**: Potential Zo advocate/user if the platform resonates; also validates Vrijen's positioning as Zo ambassador and showcases his technical capability.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
